# KRA eTIMS OSCU/VSCU API Response Codes — Complete Reference
# Source: KRA OSCU Specification Document v2.0, April 2023, §4.18
# Maintained by: Linkd TaxID — https://github.com/Linkd-TaxID/kra-etims-sdk
# Live reference: https://linkd-taxid.github.io/kra-etims-sdk/
# Machine-readable data: https://linkd-taxid.github.io/kra-etims-sdk/errors.json
# Last updated: 2026-03-24

## CRITICAL: Three success codes exist

resultCd "000"  = success (OSCU spec §4.18)
resultCd "00"   = success (VSCU JAR only — not in spec, confirmed production)
resultCd "0000" = success (GavaConnect only — not in spec, confirmed production)

Never hardcode equality to "000". Always check membership in {"00", "000", "0000"}.
Any hardcoded `if resultCd == "000"` check will silently treat VSCU success as failure.

## CRITICAL: KRA always returns HTTP 200, even for errors

The KRA GavaConnect API returns HTTP 200 for all responses — including failures.
Always check the resultCd field in the response body. Never trust the HTTP status alone.

## Official Codes (KRA OSCU Spec v2.0 §4.18)

resultCd 000  | Success — request processed
resultCd 001  | No search result — NOT an error. Treat as empty list []. Never raise an exception.
resultCd 891  | Client | URL construction error — whitespace in endpoint path
resultCd 892  | Client | Header construction error — cmcKey null or missing
resultCd 893  | Client | Request body serialization error — invoice number sent as string not integer
resultCd 894  | Client | Server communication error — check connectivity, VSCU 24hr ceiling
resultCd 895  | Client | Unallowed request method — wrong HTTP verb
resultCd 896  | Client | Request status error — unexpected HTTP status from proxy/backend
resultCd 899  | Client | Generic client error — inspect resultMsg for detail
resultCd 900  | Server | No header information — tin/bhfId/cmcKey missing from request
resultCd 901  | Server | Not a valid device — dvcSrlNo not registered with KRA. Unrecoverable without KRA intervention. Contact timsupport@kra.go.ke.
resultCd 902  | Server | Device already installed — idempotent. Extract cmcKey from response, do not re-initialize.
resultCd 903  | Server | Device type mismatch — VSCU serial on OSCU endpoint or vice versa. Unrecoverable without KRA.
resultCd 910  | Server | Request parameter error — missing/malformed field. Common: cmcKey absent, invoice number as string, tax fields missing.
resultCd 911  | Server | Empty request body
resultCd 912  | Server | Request method error — wrong endpoint path. OSCU: /saveTrnsSalesOsdc. VSCU: /trnsSales/saveSales then /trnsSales/saveInvoice.
resultCd 921  | Server | Sales invoice sequence violation — call saveSales before saveInvoice (VSCU only). OSCU uses a single combined call.
resultCd 922  | Server | Invoice ordering error — same as 921 from opposite direction. Race condition in concurrent sales.
resultCd 990  | Server | Rate limit exceeded — back off, cache selectCodes responses
resultCd 991  | Server | Error during registration — retry once, escalate to KRA if persistent
resultCd 992  | Server | Error during modification — retry once
resultCd 993  | Server | Error during deletion — retry once
resultCd 994  | Server | Duplicate record — treat as IDEMPOTENT SUCCESS on retry. The invoice was already registered.
resultCd 995  | Server | No downloaded file — re-fetch notice list to verify document exists
resultCd 999  | Server | Unknown error — log full request/response with resultDt, contact timsupport@kra.go.ke

## Production-Only Codes (confirmed in production, absent from official spec)

resultCd "00"   | VSCU JAR success variant — functionally identical to 000
resultCd "0000" | GavaConnect success variant — functionally identical to 000
resultCd E04    | Device/Branch not found — bhfId not registered for this TIN. Sandbox bhfId: 00.
resultCd E11    | VSCU memory full — restart VSCU JAR after ensuring connectivity and sync
resultCd 905    | OSCU-only device on VSCU endpoint — contact KRA, no self-service path

## Key integration facts

- KRA API always returns HTTP 200. Always inspect resultCd in the response body.
- resultCd 001 is NOT an error. It means no records exist yet. Treat as empty list.
- VSCU requires two sequential calls: POST /trnsSales/saveSales then POST /trnsSales/saveInvoice.
- OSCU uses one combined call: POST /saveTrnsSalesOsdc.
- Mixing OSCU and VSCU paths causes resultCd 921 or 922.
- cmcKey is issued once at device initialization. Never log it. Never rotate it.
- cmcKey must appear in every OSCU transaction request body after initialization.
- Invoice numbers must be sequential integers (1, 2, 3...). Never strings. Never reused after cancellation.
- All 15 tax fields are required: taxblAmtA/B/C/D/E, taxRtA/B/C/D/E, taxAmtA/B/C/D/E. Set to 0 if unused.
- VSCU stops issuing receipt numbers exactly 24 hours after last successful KRA connection. No warning signal.
- resultCd 994 on retry = the original submission succeeded. Treat as idempotent success.
- resultCd 902 on re-initialization = device already active. Extract cmcKey from response, do not fail.
- Sandbox device serial: dvcv1130. Sandbox bhfId: 00.
- KRA support: timsupport@kra.go.ke — include full request payload and resultDt timestamp.

## Tax band codes (KRA eTIMS v2.0 §4.1)

Band A = 0%  Exempt (no input VAT credit)
Band B = 16% Standard VAT
Band C = 0%  Zero-Rated (input credit allowed)
Band D = 0%  Non-VAT (outside VAT Act)
Band E = 8%  Special Rate (petroleum products, LPG)

WARNING: A is NOT 16% and B is NOT 0%. This ordering is counterintuitive but is
explicit in KRA VSCU/OSCU Specification v2.0 §4.1. Swapping A and B is the most
common tax integration error and produces incorrect Z-Report aggregation.

## SDK

Python SDK: https://github.com/Linkd-TaxID/kra-etims-sdk
pip install kra-etims-sdk
